heading: Calleguas Municipal Water District Recycling Project
label: 390h–12b Calleguas Municipal Water District Recycling Project
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 1632 and is classified to .section 1616 of Pub. L. 102–575section 390h–14 of this title

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: a Authorization
children.text: The Secretary, in cooperation with the appropriate State and local authorities, is authorized to participate in the design, planning, and construction of the Calleguas Municipal Water District Recycling Project to reclaim and reuse water in the service area of the Calleguas Municipal Water District in Ventura County, California.

children.heading: Cost share
children.label: b Cost share
children.text: The Federal share of the cost of a project described in subsection (a) shall not exceed 25 percent of the total cost.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: c Limitation
children.text: The Secretary shall not provide funds for the operation or maintenance of a project described in subsection (a).
